title: rubus × leucanthemopsis
intro: Rubus × leucanthemopsis, also known as the black raspberry hybrid, is a cross between the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the white clover (Trifolium repens) but actually is a hybrid between the Rubus idaeus and the Rubus fruticosus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that help protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Rubus × leucanthemopsis include its potential to help manage digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Rubus × leucanthemopsis can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions to be consumed as a supplement, offering a natural way to harness its medicinal properties.
